author: Marcus Breiden
description: Direct integration with Tomo, the Claude Code agent, for session interaction and automated vault updates. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Direct integration with Tomo, the Claude Code agent, for session interaction and automated vault updates.
